name: customer_id
description: Unique identifier for the customer.

name: email_address
description: Customer's primary email address.

name: first_name
description: Customer's first name.

name: location_city
description: City of residence.

name: location_country
description: Country of residence.

name: acquisition_source
description: Marketing channel where the customer was acquired.

name: creation_date
description: Date and time the customer record was created.

name: days_as_customer
description: Total number of days since the customer joined.

name: age
description: Age of the customer in years.

name: gender
description: Gender of the customer.

name: income_level
description: Categorical income level of the customer.

name: clv_score
description: Customer Lifetime Value score.

name: discount_sensitivity_score
description: Probability the customer will respond to discounts (0-1).

name: free_shipping_sensitivity_score
description: Probability the customer will respond to free shipping (0-1).

name: exclusivity_seeker_flag
description: True if the customer specifically seeks exclusive or premium products.

name: churn_probability_score
description: Calculated probability that the customer will churn (0-1).

name: social_proof_affinity
description: Propensity to be influenced by social proof/reviews.

name: content_engagement_score
description: Overall engagement score with marketing content.

name: living_room_affinity
description: Preference score for Living Room category (0-1).

name: bedroom_affinity
description: Preference score for Bedroom category (0-1).

name: kitchen_dining_affinity
description: Preference score for Kitchen & Dining category (0-1).

name: office_affinity
description: Preference score for Office category (0-1).

name: outdoor_affinity
description: Preference score for Outdoor category (0-1).

name: lighting_affinity
description: Preference score for Lighting category (0-1).

name: storage_affinity
description: Preference score for Storage category (0-1).

name: textiles_affinity
description: Preference score for Textiles category (0-1).

name: bathroom_affinity
description: Preference score for Bathroom category (0-1).

name: decoration_affinity
description: Preference score for Decoration category (0-1).

name: favorite_category
description: The category the customer interacts with most.

name: secondary_category
description: The category the customer interacts with second most.

name: cross_category_shopper
description: True if the customer has purchased from multiple categories.

name: price_tier_preference
description: Preferred price level (e.g., Luxury, Mid-Range, Budget).

name: total_purchases
description: Lifetime total number of orders.

name: total_revenue
description: Lifetime total revenue from the customer.

name: avg_order_value
description: Lifetime average order value.

name: first_purchase_date
description: Date of the customer's first purchase.

name: last_purchase_date
description: Date of the customer's most recent purchase.

name: days_since_last_purchase
description: Days elapsed since the last purchase.

name: purchase_frequency_per_month
description: Calculated average purchases per month.

name: purchases_90d
description: Total purchases in the last 90 days.

name: revenue_90d
description: Total revenue in the last 90 days.

name: avg_order_value_90d
description: Average order value in the last 90 days.

name: purchases_30d
description: Total purchases in the last 30 days.

name: revenue_30d
description: Total revenue in the last 30 days.

name: avg_order_value_30d
description: Average order value in the last 30 days.

name: most_purchased_category
description: The category with the highest purchase count.

name: most_recent_category
description: The category of the most recent purchase.

name: total_abandoned_carts
description: Lifetime total of abandoned carts.

name: total_abandoned_cart_value
description: Lifetime total value of items left in abandoned carts.

name: avg_abandoned_cart_value
description: Average value of abandoned carts.

name: last_cart_abandonment_date
description: Date of the most recent cart abandonment.

name: days_since_last_cart_abandonment
description: Days elapsed since the last cart abandonment.

name: abandoned_carts_30d
description: Total abandoned carts in the last 30 days.

name: abandoned_cart_value_30d
description: Total value of abandoned carts in the last 30 days.

name: abandoned_carts_90d
description: Total abandoned carts in the last 90 days.

name: total_events_lifetime
description: Lifetime total of all behavioral events.

name: last_event_date
description: Date of the most recent behavioral event.

name: days_since_last_event
description: Days elapsed since the last behavioral event.

name: events_90d
description: Total behavioral events in the last 90 days.

name: events_30d
description: Total behavioral events in the last 30 days.

name: most_viewed_category
description: The category the customer viewed most frequently.

name: engagement_rate_per_day
description: Calculated engagement events per day.

name: total_campaigns_received
description: Lifetime total number of marketing campaigns received.

name: total_campaigns_converted
description: Total number of campaigns that led to a purchase.

name: overall_conversion_rate
description: Lifetime campaign-to-purchase conversion rate.

name: campaigns_90d
description: Total campaigns received in the last 90 days.

name: conversions_90d
description: Total campaign conversions in the last 90 days.

name: conversion_rate_90d
description: Conversion rate in the last 90 days.

name: campaigns_30d
description: Total campaigns received in the last 30 days.

name: most_responsive_trigger_type
description: The type of campaign trigger the customer responds to best (e.g., Abandoned Cart, Welcome).

name: last_campaign_date
description: Date of the most recent marketing campaign received.

name: days_since_last_campaign
description: Days elapsed since the last campaign.

name: last_updated_at
description: Timestamp when this record was last updated.
